title: Minimum Number of Operations to Make Array Continuous
titleCn: 使数组连续的最少操作数

testcases.input: nums = [1,2,3,5,6] Output: 1 Explanation: One possible solution is to change the last element to 4. The resulting array is [1,2,3,5,4], which is continuous.
testcases.expectedOutput: 1 Explanation: One possible solution is to change the last element to 4. The resulting array is [1,2,3,5,4], which is continuous.

testcases.input: nums = [1,10,100,1000] Output: 3 Explanation: One possible solution is to: - Change the second element to 2. - Change the third element to 3. - Change the fourth element to 4. The resulting array is [1,2,3,4], which is continuous.
testcases.expectedOutput: 3 Explanation: One possible solution is to: - Change the second element to 2. - Change the third element to 3. - Change the fourth element to 4. The resulting array is [1,2,3,4], which is continuous.
